## Summary

<!-- What does this change do and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check src tests` passes
- [ ] `ruff format --check src tests` passes
- [ ] `mypy src` passes
- [ ] `pytest` passes
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change
- [ ] Updated docs / CHANGELOG where relevant
